metadata.heist_focus: weapon-rack hazards, shield-wall bypassing, noisy forge suppression, and tactical loot denial
metadata.coordination_problem: combat-adjacent heist where the ogre opens lanes while stealth roles prevent the alarm from compounding
metadata.goblin_aesthetic: stolen bolts, goblin dents in polished shields, oily forge smoke, and racks of dwarf-sized inconvenience

entry_warren.name: Goblin Entry Warren
entry_warren.description: A cramped goblin approach lined with stolen bolts, goblin dents in polished shields, oily forge smoke, and racks of dwarf-sized inconvenience.

mischief_lane.name: Mischief Lane
mischief_lane.description: The main coordination lane for weapon-rack hazards, shield-wall bypassing, noisy forge suppression, and tactical loot denial.

objective_hold.name: Anvil Plan Post
objective_hold.description: Swipe the anvil plan so the goblins know which dwarven locks fit which stolen hammers.

furniture.name: Shield-Stack Shadow
furniture.description: Shield-Stack Shadow supports weapon-rack hazards, shield-wall bypassing, noisy forge suppression, and tactical loot denial.

furniture.message: The scout hides among shields too polished to be trustworthy.

break_effect.message: Shield-Stack Shadow breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Forge Bellows
furniture.description: Forge Bellows supports weapon-rack hazards, shield-wall bypassing, noisy forge suppression, and tactical loot denial.

furniture.message: The kobold teaches the bellows to wheeze quietly.

break_effect.message: Forge Bellows breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Bolt Bucket
furniture.description: Bolt Bucket supports weapon-rack hazards, shield-wall bypassing, noisy forge suppression, and tactical loot denial.

furniture.message: Enough bolts vanish to make every crossbowman suspicious.
One more shiny thing joins the goblin retirement plan.

treasure.message: Enough bolts vanish to make every crossbowman suspicious.
One more shiny thing joins the goblin retirement plan.

break_effect.message: Bolt Bucket breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

scripts.coordination_contract: combat-adjacent heist where the ogre opens lanes while stealth roles prevent the alarm from compounding

achievements.title: Quiet Toolwork
achievements.description: Resolve a mechanism or alarm feature in Rustsprocket Armory pico without turning the run into a brawl.

achievements.title: Mischief Coordination
achievements.description: Create a distraction or trap setup that opens the Rustsprocket Armory route.

achievements.title: Snack Tax With Interest
achievements.description: Take optional loot while still completing the pico heist.
